100 Ways to Stay Motivated

Get Motivated!!! Flip your switch to ignite your fire and get moving towards your dreams!





Potential

Success is not defined by what was done yesterday. In fact, it’s the difference between reality, where you are at right now, and where you want to be.



Checksheet Download

This 100 Ways to Stay Motivated downloadable curriculum checksheet lays out the exact steps you need to take in order to discover your inspiration. This course is comprised of a series of videos, questions, and practical exercises, which will get you properly applying the concepts in each course.





Personal Development

Whether you read a book a week, do things you’re fearful of, or simply seek to be exceptional in every area of life, the best investment is always in yourself.





Time Management

Learn to schedule the day, make quality family time, keep a full calendar, stay busy, and basically get all the things in life done, long before required and win!





Self-Esteem

For anyone who has goals to achieve, high self-esteem is essential. In life, learn how to stay involved, try new things, and look for chances to help others.





Stay Energized

Learn how to increase energy with little things like daily exercise, healthy eating, avoiding sugar, power naps, moving with urgency and say a big YES to life.







Purpose

When you approach success as your duty, you have a higher purpose than just money. You’ll give more than is expected and create rituals that put you in charge.





Magnetism

As you learn to never lower your target mentality, you’ll see how to dominate your space, get attention, make the news and become a celebrity in your space.





Goals

Learn how to write down your goals each day and again before you sleep. This action helps you picture what you want and to focus on the FUTURE, not the past.





10X

Master how to be a maniac at your career and life. Strive to do a little more each day, learn to surround yourself with winners and accomplish more than ever.





Follow-Through

As you learn to focus on daily targets, do the most difficult things first, and complete every task you start, you’ll push yourself to do more than is possible.
